description: Raw telemetry + Platinum substage labels for a Copper stage window (labels time-joined, since Platinum is keyed by TD stage). Powers the Copper Stage Detection dashboard.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH stage_window AS (SELECT CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AS s_start, CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) AS s_end FROM featurestore:merged_copper_stage_index_v1 WHERE name = :well_name AND copper_stage_num = :stage_num ORDER BY stage_start_ts LIMIT 1), bounds AS (SELECT s_start - (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS c_start, s_end + (:context_minutes || ' minutes')::interval AS c_end FROM stage_window), telemetry AS (SELECT t.name AS well_name, CAST(:stage_num AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, t.record_ts AS ts, CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'design' THEN 'slurry' WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'na' THEN NULL ELSE p.substage END AS substage_label, t.rate_slurry, t.press_mainline, CASE WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN t.prop_conc_inline WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN t.prop_conc_target WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN t.prop_conc_blend_auger ELSE t.prop_conc_blend_denso END AS selected_concentration, p.inferred_pressure, p.inferred_design_rate AS design_rate, p.inferred_design_rate * 0.95 AS design_rate_high, p.inferred_design_rate * 0.90 AS design_rate_rampdown, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS context_anchor FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 t CROSS JOIN bounds b LEFT JOIN featurestore:merged_platinum_labels_v1 p ON p.name = t.name AND CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS timestamp) = t.record_ts WHERE t.name = :well_name AND t.record_ts BETWEEN b.c_start AND b.c_end), boundary_points AS (SELECT CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, c_start AS ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS substage_label, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS inferred_pressure, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate_high, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate_rampdown, 0.0 AS context_anchor FROM bounds UNION ALL SELECT CAST(:well_name AS TEXT) AS well_name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num, c_end AS ts, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS substage_label, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS rate_slurry, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS press_mainline, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS selected_concentration, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS inferred_pressure, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate_high, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate_rampdown, 0.0 AS context_anchor FROM bounds) SELECT * FROM telemetry UNION ALL SELECT * FROM boundary_points ORDER BY ts) q
